titleStmt.title: SII 5.733: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 733. (A.R. No. 169 of 1895). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MANDAPA SURROUNDING THE SHRINE OF THE GODDESS IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟavarmma rāna tribhuvanacakra vatti konermakoṇṭāṉ tiruppāppūnayiṉār kaṅkaikku vāyāp perumā
ḷāṉa sundarapāṇyade vaṟku Iyāṇṭu 2vatu Etir tai Aparapakṣa ttu ṣaṣṭi yum budhavāram sukarmmayo
gam gajakaraṇam peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ Attattu nāḷ jātarāṉa tirunelvelipperumāḷeṉap peruṭaiya nām kiḻka
ḷakkūṟṟam kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ cikaiyilāyamuṭaiya nayiṉāṟkum ṉācciyār Āṉantavalliyāṟ
kum tiru Artta cāmattu paḷḷiyaṟaiyi leḻunta(a)ruḷiyiruntu paḷḷiaṟaicciṟappu Amutuceyyumpaṭikku Amu
tupaṭi kaṟiyamutu Uppamutu miḷakamutu neyyamutu Ilaiyamutu Aṭaikkāyamutu cāttuppaṭi cāttuppaṭit tira
viyam tiruvācal tirupparivaṭṭam Āka Eṟppeyaṟpaṭṭatum cempināṭṭu brahmadeśam vaḷanāṭāṉa Āṭavallacuntaraca
(t)turve tamaṅkalattu maṇalūr Irā pperumāḷ muttaṉ perumāḷ taṉmamāka nittiya niyamamāka naṭantu
potumpaṭi tiyākapañcavaneri ca
raikkāṭṭukkum tevatāṉamāṉa noccikuḷattu
veṭṭaikāṟaṉkuḷattu paṟṟukkum tiyākapañcavaṉeri ñcaikkāṭṭukku meṟkut teṉ Elkai nayiṉār cuvāmitevana
ṉa ppiṟamāṇa kai ceṭiyaṉūril paṟṟukkut teṉvaṭakku vā
vaṇerip paṟṟukkum Itaṉ vaṭakkut te paṟṟukkum kiḻakku vaṭavelkai Eri vākaikkuḷattukku
teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuṭpaṭṭa nāḷ jātaṉāṉa nammā
velipperumāḷ ma lukku muṉṉāḷ tāṉamāka kuṭutta pākam Oṉṟukku nilam
Itu ppaṭiyāṉukku taṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta pākam Oṉṟukku
nilam nālu mā Ituvum Ākap pākam Iraṇṭukku nilam Eṭṭu māvum niṅkalāka nikki Uṇṭāṉa nilattukku num ma
voti Uḷppaṭa māttāl koṭṭai muṉṟe Arakkālāka kuṭivaricai nilai Āṭaiyākavum melpā
kkellām kkaiyāka Āṇṭu
ttāka Iṭattu Ippaṟṟu Iraṇ mutta(ṉ)pperumāḷa Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku kuṭippaṟṟukki
kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāka potumpaṭi Ācantitāraval cantatipiṟavecame ti
ṇiyāka nayiṉār caṉṉatiyil viṇṇappam ceytamaikku Ivaṟkku Intappaṭic caṇṭeccuracātaṉamum(k)ku
maikku Iṉṉilattil Uṇṭāṉa kaṭamai kuṭimai Antarāyam poṉva rip putuvarip pañcupili cantuvikka
rakappeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu varippaṇam ma ppaṇam nallaerutu nalppacu viṭuvelai koṭṭamatiḷ maṟṟum
nāṅ koḷḷum komuṟaikaḷumme variyilār kaṇakkilum taviṟtu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku jalanidhinikṣepapāṣāṇaakṣi
ddhasidvasāddhya ṅka ḷeṉṟu collappaṭṭa Aṣṭabhogatejasvāmi yaṅkaḷāka Uḷḷa samastaprāpti kaḷum dānādivini
vikkirayaṅkaḷukkum yokkiyamāka cemapilum cilaiyilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum cempinā tiruppullāṇiyil parākki
ramapāṇṭiya ṇṭiyateva nallaperurumāḷ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.733 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
